front: What is the significance of Nepsilon-methyllysine in histone modification?
back: Methyllysine residues on histones (H3K4, H3K9, H3K27, H3K36, H4K20) are written by methyltransferases and erased by demethylases. Methylation state determines gene activation or repression. H3K4me3 marks active promoters; H3K9me3 marks heterochromatin.
